philosophy.notes: Apple HIG pass preserves the personal technical dossier premise while tightening control behavior, theme switching, compact navigation, and reduced-motion handling.

hierarchy.notes: The visual hierarchy remains unchanged; interaction refinements clarify which elements are controls without adding new modules or decorative weight.

execution.notes: Menu and theme controls now expose explicit labels, menu state updates the visible label, hover treatment is limited to fine pointers, and reduced-motion users avoid pulse/marquee/title animation.

specificity.notes: Content remains grounded in Miguel's actual proof points: EV hardware, RF automation, embedded vehicles, return offer, working PCBs, closed-loop firmware, and lab-tested systems.

restraint.notes: The pass improves native-feeling behavior without changing the palette, typography, section rhythm, or compact contact footer.
